description:
SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS,
Android and desktop apps рџ“±!

Unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX has no identifiers assigned to the users - it does not use phone
numbers (like Signal or WhatsApp), domain-based addresses (like email, XMPP or Matrix), usernames (like Telegram),
public keys or even random numbers (like all other messengers) to identify its users - we do not even know how many
people use SimpleX.
New in v6.4.4:
- reduced battery usage.
- fixes.
The GitHub release build is independently reproduced by:

Commits:
- rfc: channels MVP scope (#6131)
- core, ui: improve removing tracking parameters (#6170)
- core: 6.4.3.1
- 6.4.3.1: ios 295, android 314, desktop 117
- docs: update FAQ (#6171)
- flatpak: update metainfo (#6172)
- core: fix member contact request not showing incognito correctly (#6174)
- android, desktop: compose 1.8.2 + Kotlin 2.1.20 + compileSdk 35 (#5774)
- android: prevent service notification from being swiped away (it kills the service) (#6175)
- core: save correct body for received message record, instead of full batch body (#6188)
- core, ui: chat relay addresses (#6191)
- ios: export localizations
- github/workflows/build: disable aarch64 tests (#6192)
- core: additional whitelisted query string parameters (not removed from URLs) (#6190)
- core, ui: safe mode to sanitize URIs when sending (#6196)
- core: fix forwarding for connection deleting events (x.grp.mem.del, x.grp.del) (#6189)
- core: exclude deleted entities when retrieving connection entity (#6198)
- core: add tests for forwarding of connection deleting events in support scope (#6197)
- core: 6.4.4.0 (simplexmq 6.4.4.0)
- ios: update core library
- ui: translations (#6199)
- website: translations (#6200)
- core: fix duplicate error on group link creation (#6204)
- core: enable files in business groups by default (#6206)
- core: 6.4.4.1
- android: reduce battery usage by not using permanent wakelock (#6176)
- 6.4.4-beta.0: ios 296, android 316, desktop 118
- core: fix member version range not being correctly updated in some cases (fixes introducing owner to member in review, when host admin was invited via owner's link; likely fixes other interactions that check version) (#6208)
- core: forward member name; ui: don't show "Member" label if unknown member was created with name (#6211)
- docs: update FAQ (#6215)
- docs: update downloads page (#6216)
- core: pre- and post-start chat hooks for CLI-based bots (#6217)
- core: update simplexmq
- docs: simplex name and logo (#6218)
- ios: update core library
- directory: use bot commands and menu in SimpleX Directory (#6219)
- install.sh: fix linux arch (#6173)
- bots: generate code for TypeScript types module from Haskell tests (#6220)
- core: 6.4.4.2
- Translated using Weblate (Hungarian) (#6228)
- ui: translations (#6227)
- ios: update core library
- android: hold wakelock for 30 seconds after received event was processed, to prevent race condition with incoming call activity. (#6224)
- 6.4.4: ios 297, android 317, desktop 119
